homeCta.heading: Let's build something exceptional.
homeCta.body: Whether you have a product idea, need a technical partner, or want to level up an existing codebase — I'd love to hear from you.

projects.heroBody: A curated collection of projects spanning full-stack applications, interactive interfaces, and design systems. Every piece here was built with intention — crafted to solve real problems and leave a lasting impression.
projects.gridBody: Filter by discipline or scroll through the full archive. Each project represents a distinct challenge, a deliberate solution, and a story worth telling.
projects.caseStudyBody:
Luminary began as a personal frustration: existing journaling apps felt clinical and cold. The goal was to build something that felt like a conversation — warm, intelligent, and deeply personal. Over eight weeks, I designed and engineered the full product solo: from user research and wireframes through to a production-ready Next.js application with an OpenAI-powered reflection engine.

The core challenge was latency. Generative responses needed to feel instant, not mechanical. I implemented streaming completions with a custom React hook, reducing perceived response time by 60%. The mood-tracking layer uses a fine-tuned sentiment model to surface weekly emotional patterns in a minimal, non-intrusive chart — built entirely with D3.js and animated with Framer Motion.

Luminary launched to 1,200 users in its first week, with a 74% day-7 retention rate — a metric that validated the core thesis: people return when an app genuinely listens.
projects.ctaBody: I'm currently open to select freelance engagements and full-time opportunities. If you're building something ambitious and need a collaborator who cares as much about craft as delivery — let's talk.

about.heroBody: I'm a full-stack developer and creative technologist who believes great software should feel as good as it performs. I obsess over the details — the micro-interaction, the 12ms render, the pixel that's one shade off.
about.bioBody:
I'm Alex Mercer, a software engineer and UI craftsman based in Berlin. I've spent the last seven years building products at the intersection of engineering precision and design sensibility — from early-stage startups to scale-ups serving millions of users.

My work spans full-stack web applications, design systems, and interactive experiences. I care deeply about performance, accessibility, and the kind of polish that makes users trust a product before they've read a single word of copy.

When I'm not pushing commits, I'm shooting 35mm film, reading about type history, or hunting for the perfect espresso.
about.techBody: My toolkit is opinionated and intentional — every technology here is something I've used in production, not just a tutorial.
about.expBody: A timeline of the roles, companies, and milestones that shaped how I think and build.
about.ctaBody: I'm selectively available for new projects, collaborations, and full-time opportunities. If you have something interesting, I'd love to hear about it.
